result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 3:        AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) A...
                                                  ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id NOT IN (
      SELECT caseid__c FROM casehistory__c
      WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id NOT IN (
      SELECT caseid__c FROM casehistory__c
      WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds

WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'

  AND id NOT IN (
      SELECT caseid__c FROM casehistory__c
      WHERE field__c = 'Owner'

GROUP BY ownerid

LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((closeddate::timestamp) - (createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id NOT IN (
      SELECT caseid__c FROM casehistory__c
      WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

result.preview: "There is no agent in the support data who both (a) processed more than one case in the past four months and (b) has at least one case that was closed without ever being transferred. As a result, no agent Id satisfies all of the specified conditions over the given time period."

args.answer: There is no agent in the support data who both (a) processed more than one case in the past four months and (b) has at least one case that was closed without ever being transferred. As a result, no agent Id satisfies all of the specified conditions over the given time period.

val_args.answer: There is no agent in the support data who both (a) processed more than one case in the past four months and (b) has at least one case that was closed without ever being transferred. As a result, no agent Id satisfies all of the specified conditions over the given time period.
